title: The Most Powerful Claude Code Feature In Months Dropped & Nobody is Talking About It
summary: Graphify is a non-RAG solution for analyzing large code bases by creating knowledge graphs, reducing token overhead and improving response accuracy. The feature integrates with Claude Code and offers an alternative to traditional retrieval-augmented generation for code understanding.
